findings.summary: The fix for evidenceBundles.shape.test.ts added assertions for the indexes but still failed to assert the absence of update/delete helpers as explicitly requested in the previous spec review.
findings.suggested_fix: Add an assertion in the shape test to ensure no update/delete helpers are present (e.g. expect(schemaSrc).not.toContain('update') and expect(schemaSrc).not.toContain('delete')).
